game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
In this classic point-and-click adventure anthology by award-winning indie developer Scriptwelder, you'll protect an unsuspecting hamlet from yourself, try to prepare for an incoming undead horde, and search a seemingly empty spaceship for answers to a gruesome mystery. From the creator of Don't Escape: 4 Days to Survive comes the original games that started it all. Don't Escape Trilogy contains all three of scriptwelder's original point-and-click horror adventures, compiled and preserved for Steam. Each small game within the anthology is a unique, standalone adventure that puts clever twists on every setting and format.

PLEASE NOTE: These games do not contain any new content from their original versions.



In Don't Escape, players find themselves in a remote cabin overlooking a tiny village. Before night falls, you'll need to find a way to effectively secure yourself inside the cabin, using everything at your disposal, in order to protect the townsfolk from yourself. Because when the full moon rises, you're not your best self...



In Don't Escape 2, you and your friend have barely suvived the undead ravaging your town, and must find a way to fortify the place you've holed up in before nightfall. Only problem is, the clock is ticking as you scour the surrounding countryside for supplies, and your friend isn't looking so great...



In Don't Escape 3, you awaken onboard a silent spaceship that holds a gruesome discovery. Without your memories, you need to find a way back home while unraveling the mystery of what happened to you and the crew, but are you really as alone as you think you are?

Offering the top-notch atmosphere scriptwelder has become known for and creative puzzles and situations for you to overcome using logical problem solving skills, often with different solutions, the Don't Escape Trilogy is the perfect way to spend an evening with the lights turned down and the volume turned up.

About the Developer:

Poland-based developer Scriptwelder is a well known creator of creepy web-based games, perhaps the most iconic of which is the Deep Sleep series, which has won multiple awards and been played by millions all around the world. The Don't Escape series began as a web game in 2013 that inverted the classic escape-the-room formula... rather than trying to find a way out, players were instead trying to find a way to secure themselves within, usually from some sort of threat or danger. He recently released Don't Escape: 4 Days to Survive, his first full length premium game.
game_info.description: You awaken in a mysterious facility with limited time before nightfall. In this reverse escape room experience, you must explore interconnected rooms, collect items, and solve puzzles to secure yourself inside before the transformation begins. Combine items cleverly, barricade doors, and make strategic choices about which defenses to prioritize. The clock is ticking, and survival depends on your preparation skills.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move between rooms and navigate
Space: Interact with objects, pick up items, use items
Z: Open/close inventory
Shift: Combine selected items in inventory
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. This test validates that the player can navigate between rooms, interact with objects, and collect items. It ensures the fundamental game mechanics work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move systematically through all accessible rooms, interact with every interactable object, and collect all available items. Test room transitions and inventory management.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate all rooms, collect multiple items, and verify that interactions update game state properly. Test passes when player can move freely and interact with the environment without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test. This validates that the game is winnable by implementing the best strategy to secure all entry points before time runs out.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Efficiently collect critical items (planks, nails, chains, sedatives), prioritize securing the main door and windows, combine items to create barricades, and complete all necessary preparations before the timer expires.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully secure all vulnerable entry points, use sedatives at the right time, and survive the night without escaping. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state, confirming the win condition is achievable.

TEST_3.test_description: Item combination mechanics test. This validates that the crafting system works correctly and that combined items produce the expected results.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Collect pairs of combinable items (planks + nails, chain + lock), open inventory, select items, and use Shift to combine them. Verify combined items appear in inventory and can be used.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully create barricades and locked chains from raw materials. Combined items should replace their components in inventory and be usable on appropriate targets.
TEST_3.description: Item combination mechanics test. This validates that the crafting system works correctly and that combined items produce the expected results.

TEST_3.expected: Successfully create barricades and locked chains from raw materials. Combined items should replace their components in inventory and be usable on appropriate targets.

TEST_4.test_description: Time management and failure condition test. This validates that the game properly handles the lose condition when time runs out without adequate preparation.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally waste time by moving between rooms without collecting items or securing defenses. Let the timer run down to zero without completing critical preparations.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state when time expires with insufficient defenses. Lose message should clearly indicate the failure reason.
